text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
"Trending on Social Media! C-I-C-A Extract
Ampoules That Leave Your Skin Ultra Moist and
Supple!" ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Cica? Ampoule? Booster? Ohh, I bet a city girl
could make sense of this mumbo jumbo. O-okay
then...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Mr. Smartphone, I need your help! Save me with
that super search magic of yours!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
"A booster refers to a balancing serum..."
Balancing serum? What's that?
